data.name: Sharkry

weaponImprint.name: Robinson Modular Rifle
weaponImprint.trait: Gain 1 random buff for 1 turn if the user has full HP at the start of the action.
weaponImprint.effect: For every 3 points of Confectance Index consumed, the targeted damage of the next active skill is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.

data.effects: A mischievous, impish Doll whose sweet smiles hide a cute cunning. She is hungry not only for the stage but also for the boundless adoration from her customers. ♥

skills.name: Love Shot
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Makeup Organization
skills.description: At the start of action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] is applied to an enemy target, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Critical rate against targets with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] is increased by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel2: At the start of action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] is applied to an enemy target, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Critical rate increased by 30% against targets with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a]. Critical damage increased by 3% per buff effect on this unit, up to a maximum of 15%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: At the start of action, gains 1 stack of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a] and 1 point of Confectance Index. When [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] is applied to an enemy target, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Critical rate increased by 30% against targets with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a]. Critical damage increased by 3% per buff effect on this unit, up to a maximum of 15%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Critical Rate is increased by 10% against targets with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a]. Critical damage is increased by 3% for each active buff, up to a maximum of 15%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: At the start of action, gains 1 stack of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a].

skills.name: Boiling Soundwaves
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 1 turn, and deals Burn damage equal to 140% of attack to them. If the user is under the effects of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a], Increases stability damage dealt by 1 point.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turn, and deals Burn damage equal to 140% of attack to them. If the user is under the effects of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a], Increases stability damage dealt by 1 point.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase the duration of [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] by 1 turn.

skills.name: Perfect Rising Tone
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing physical damage equal to 150% of attack to them. This unit gains [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a]. If the target is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], applies 2 stacks of [effect:6f14204f-abba-469b-b056-ca1588d14104] before the attack, and changes the damage type to Burn damage.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing physical damage equal to 150% of attack to them. Gains [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a]. If the target is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], applies 2 stacks of [effect:6f14204f-abba-469b-b056-ca1588d14104] before the attack, and changes the damage type to Burn damage. If the enemy is killed, gains 1 additional stack of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If a kill is scored, gains 1 additional stack of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a].

skills.name: Highlight Moment
skills.description: Gains 1 stack of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a] for 1 turn. Gains 1 instance of [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Gains 1 stack of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a], as well as [effect:6fd51e21-f25d-4ef4-b554-e00aef225a58] for 1 turn. Gains 1 instance of [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel3: Gains 1 stack of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a], as well as [effect:6fd51e21-f25d-4ef4-b554-e00aef225a58] for 1 turn. Gains 1 instance of [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The user gains [effect:6fd51e21-f25d-4ef4-b554-e00aef225a58] for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The effects of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a] are enhanced, increasing damage dealt by 5%.

keys.effect: If the unit has more than 1 buff, increase damage dealt by 7%.
Damage dealt by [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] is changed to Burn damage.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.

When an enemy target within range is affected by [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], perform 1 instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to them.
At the start of this unit's action, if there is an enemy with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] on the field, gains [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] for 1 turn.
When using the active skill Perfect Rising Tone, if the target has [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], gains [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] before the attack for 2 turns.
When using the active skill Boiling Soundwaves, if a kill is scored, gain 1 stack of [effect:4aca66a4-3aff-4344-9130-f3c14b18f74a].
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 5 - Target Is Your Heart

keys.effect: After attacking a target with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], restores 20% of max HP.

vertebrae.effect: Increase the duration of [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] by 1 turn.

doll.name: Sharkry
doll.effects: A mischievous, impish Doll whose sweet smiles hide a cute cunning. She is hungry not only for the stage but also for the boundless adoration from her customers. ♥

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by Support Attacks is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

Increase damage dealt by 15%, and increase stability damage by 2 points. This stacks up to 2 time and is effective once. This buff cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"cf8d915d-957f-47c3-a877-e27197b0ed64","upgradeName":"V5","upgradeDetails":"

Increase damage dealt by 20%, and increase stability damage by 2 points. Maximum of 2 stacks. Triggers 1 time. This buff cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
